title: Sasha (disambiguation)
content:
'''Sasha''' may refer to:

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Sasha]]''', an [[Scout/Legends|explorer]] affiliated with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]
*'''[[Sasha ot Sulem]]''', the daughter of [[Rundil ot Sulem]]
*'''[[Sasha Pancho]]''', a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] affiliated with the Alliance to Restore the Republic
*'''[[Sashal]]''', a [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lady]] of the [[Lost Tribe of Sith]]
*'''[[Sashana]]''', a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]
*'''[[Sashasa]]''', a [[City/Legends|city]] on [[Ukio/Legends|Ukio]]

==Real world==
*'''[[Sasha Frost]]''', an actress

{{Disambig}}
